report.hypothesis: Enhancing hydrophobic interactions at the SSTR2 binding interface by mutating positions 5 and 6 will improve binding affinity as measured by ddG.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current design protocol is generating candidates with poor structural qualit

report.hypothesis: The current design protocol is generating candidates with poor structural quality and docking performance. Tightening structural and binding energy thresholds is necessary to improve candidate quality.

proposed_changes.rationale: The current clash threshold may be too lenient, allowing unstable structures to pass. Reducing it will enforce better packing and structural quality.
The current ddG threshold may be too low, allowing candidates with insufficient binding energy to pass. Tightening it will favor stronger binders.
